spell.legendary_spellbooks.ambush_thorns: Envelop yourself in ambush thorns. While the effect lasts, incoming attackers have a 50% chance to be struck back, taking fixed thorn damage plus 20% of the damage they dealt.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.annihilation_: Fires an Ender laser straight forward. When used near the ground at a shallow angle, the beam releases scattered projectiles. The caster cannot move while firing.
Explodes on contact with the ground or an entity, dealing damage and releasing scattered projectiles around the impact point.
Project a sweeping shockwave in a wide cone before you, dealing damage and burning foes while inflicting an additional 3% of their maximum health as annihilation damage.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.cloud_rail.gu: Summons a cloud in front of the caster and drops it. Deals damage around the impact point.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.cloud_ring.gu: Summons multiple cloud rings around the caster and drops them, dealing damage around each impact point.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.cumulo_charge: Summons a phantom cumulonimbus above the caster and launches it forward. It stops on contact with an entity, dealing damage and stunning nearby targets. When used with lock-on, it weakly homes toward the locked target.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.energy_beam.g: Lifts the caster while charging power and fires a beam that follows their gaze. The caster cannot move while firing and is stunned briefly afterward.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.glacier_erupt: Erupt a line of jagged ice spikes before you, striking enemies in their path and freezing them for a short duration
spell.legendary_spellbooks.glacier_ringb: Unleash a circular burst of rising ice spikes around you, striking nearby foes and freezing them for a short duration.
Summons storm clouds in front of the caster that drop lightning.
Fires multiple tornadoes outward from the caster, restraining any entity they touch for a short time.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.summon_flameb: Summons a Flameborn Guard and a Flameborn Warrior. Their attack power and health increase with spell level.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.summon_haunte: Summons a Haunted Guard and a Haunted Knight. Their attack power and health increase with spell level. As a 'feature'—or a bug—they do not take damage from Possessed Paladins.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.thunder_fanbu: Fires a lightning strike that travels forward along the ground.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.tornado.guide: Places a tornado at the point the caster is looking at, restraining any entity that touches it for a short time.
spell.legendary_spellbooks.triple_nimbus: Summons storm clouds in front, front-right, and front-left of the caster that drop lightning.
tooltip.legendary_spellbooks.stormbound_: This spellbook calls forth thunder, causing rain to swell into storms.
